class.name: EnvironmentQuery3D
class.brief_description: A node used to gather environment data using a [QueryGenerator3D] and evaluating them using [QueryTest3D]s.
class.description: [b]EnvironmentQuery3D[/b] provides a flexible, node-based system for AI agents to ask spatial questions about the environment. Queries are composed by adding one [QueryGenerator3D] as child of the environment query and assigning [QueryTest3D]s as children of the [QueryGenerator3D]. Queries are time sliced in the background to maintain performance.

method.name: get_result
method.description: After requesting a query, the [QueryResult3D] is cached and can be called with this function.

method.name: request_query
method.description: Request a query, processing it in the background, emitting [signal EnvironmentQuery3D.query_finished] when done.

members.member: Amount of time in milliseconds the query has each frame for processing. When budget is reached, the query pauses until the next [signal SceneTree.process_frame].
If [code]true[/code] creates debug visuals in the environment, showing each [QueryItem3D].

signal.name: query_finished
signal.description: Emitted when the query finishes processing.

signal.name: tests_finished
signal.description: Emitted when the tests are finished, leading to finishing the query.
